name: Argo Global Listed Infrastructure Limited
analysis: ALI has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 1% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$2.5700. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$2.5800, stop A$2.3760, target A$3.1920 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
